name: Local-Web-Capture
description: Capture web content (articles, prices) from the user's localhost so requests originate from the user's own IP — used to reach geo-restricted or region-locked sites (Israeli news, Israeli e-commerce). Headless-first escalation ladder: webclaw → stealth → real-Chrome via bb-browser. Saves normalized output to ~/local-web-capture/ and supports capture+translate (Hebrew→English default, arbitrary pairs).
